content: My father is a quiet man. He doesn't talk much, but he shows his love through actions. Every morning, he wakes up early to prepare breakfast for me. Last winter, I caught a bad cold. He sat by my bed all night, putting a wet towel on my forehead to reduce the fever. When I opened my eyes in the morning, I saw him ____ in the chair, still holding the towel. His love is like silent sunshine, always warm and always there.
analysis: 本题考察上下文逻辑与动词辨析。前文提到父亲整夜照顾生病的“我”（sat by my bed all night），且早晨“我”睁眼时他“still holding the towel”（仍拿着毛巾）。根据常理，整夜未眠的人此时最可能的状态是“在椅子上睡着了”，因此A（sleeping）符合语境。B（working）与疲惫照顾病人的场景矛盾；C（reading）缺乏上下文支持；D（standing）与前文“in the chair”的坐姿描述冲突。

content: Good study habits are important for success. Many students think studying for a long time is the best way, but this is not always true. Taking short breaks can actually help your brain work better. When you study, try the 'Pomodoro Technique': study for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break. During the break, you can stand up, stretch, or look out of the window. This method helps you ____ and remember more. Remember, studying smart is better than just studying hard!
analysis:
本题考察上下文逻辑与词汇运用。
1. 语境分析：前文提到'学习25分钟后休息5分钟'的方法，后文说'帮助...并记住更多'，中间应填入与'提高学习效果'相关的积极动词。
2. 选项辨析：
   A. concentrate（集中注意力）——符合'高效学习'的语境，休息后能更好地集中精力
   B. sleep（睡觉）——休息时可能包含但非主要目的
   C. forget（忘记）——与'记住更多'矛盾
   D. repeat（重复）——未体现休息带来的核心益处
3. 逻辑验证：'帮助集中注意力并记住更多'构成合理并列关系，且与全文提倡'科学学习'的主题一致。

content: My father is a quiet man. He doesn't talk much, but he shows his love through actions. Every morning, he gets up early to make breakfast for me. Last winter, I was sick and had to stay in bed. He sat beside me, reading my favorite book aloud. His voice was warm and gentle. When I felt better, I found a note under my pillow. It said, 'Get well soon, my brave girl.' That note made me realize that love doesn't always need words. Sometimes, it's in the small things we ____ for each other.
analysis: 正确答案是A。全文通过父亲做早餐、陪读、写纸条等具体行动（actions）体现亲情，最后一句总结“爱通常存在于我们为彼此做的小事中”。do对应前文的actions（行动），而say（说）、buy（买）、write（写）均不能概括文中多种关怀行为。

content: Last summer, my family and I went camping in the mountains. We set up our tent near a clear lake. During the day, we hiked on forest trails and enjoyed the fresh air. In the evening, we sat around the campfire, telling stories and ____ marshmallows. It was a wonderful way to relax and spend time together away from the busy city life.
analysis: 正确答案是C。解析：根据上下文，故事发生在露营时，晚上围坐在篝火旁，结合'marshmallows（棉花糖）'这一线索，可知最合理的活动是'烤棉花糖'。'roasting'专指在火上烤制食物，符合露营场景。A选项'buying（购买）'不符合露营自给自足的语境；B选项'cooking（烹饪）'泛指做饭，不如'roasting'准确；D选项'washing（清洗）'与篝火活动无关。

content: Protecting our environment is everyone's duty. We can start with small actions in daily life. For example, we should turn off lights when leaving a room to save electricity. We can also use reusable bags instead of plastic ones when shopping. Another good habit is to ____ waste paper, bottles and cans so they can be made into new things. If we all do our part, the Earth will become cleaner and healthier.
analysis: 正确答案是A。本题考察环保语境下的动词辨析。1. 语义逻辑：后文提到“so they can be made into new things（以便它们能被制成新物品）”，这明确指向“回收再利用”的概念。2. 词汇搭配：“recycle waste paper/bottles/cans（回收废纸/瓶子/罐子）”是固定环保表达。3. 干扰项分析：B项“collect（收集）”虽与环保相关，但未突出“循环利用”的核心目的；C项“burn（焚烧）”会造成污染，与环保理念相悖；D项“forget（忘记）”完全不符合语境。4. 篇章连贯：全文围绕具体环保行动展开，“recycle”与前后文的“save electricity”“use reusable bags”构成并列的环保行为链。

content: My mother always says that love is in the little things. Last Sunday, I was studying for my final exams in my room. I felt very tired and a bit stressed. Suddenly, I smelled something sweet coming from the kitchen. I walked out and saw my mom carefully placing a cup of hot milk and a plate of cookies on the table. She didn't say much, just smiled and said, 'Take a break, dear.' At that moment, I felt all my stress ____. I realized that her quiet love was the greatest support.
analysis: 本题考察上下文逻辑与动词辨析。前文提到“我”因备考感到疲惫和压力，母亲默默准备了牛奶和饼干并让“我”休息。根据故事发展，母亲关爱的举动会让“我”的压力减轻或消失。A选项disappear（消失）最符合“压力消散”的语境。B选项increase（增加）与情感走向相反；C选项change（改变）过于笼统；D选项arrive（到达）与压力情境不符。且后句“意识到她的默默关爱是最大的支持”进一步印证压力因温暖而消散。
